# TiledStyleDefinition.TileHorizontalBorders property

The `fTileHorizontalBorders` flag (NSlice +0x44) — non-zero ⇒ the top/bottom border strips are tiled rather than stretched. `-1` when undecoded.

```csharp
public int TileHorizontalBorders { get; set; }
```
